title: Admin Assistant
description:
Job Description:

  • Perform front desk reception duties, including answering and transferring phone calls, and attending to walk-in parents, students, and vendors
  • Issue and track keys for staff use of special rooms
  • Attend to unwell students at the sick bay and maintain accurate health records
  • Contact parents/guardians to update them on students’ medical conditions
  • Record details of students leaving school early due to illness or medical appointments and ensure Early Dismissal forms are properly completed
  • Maintain Lost & Found records and track item movements at the end of each school term
  • Receive deliveries and notify staff for collection from the General Office
  • Collate and manage records of students who have not collected their testimonials
  • Manage the issuance and return of school uniforms on loan to students
  • Distribute mailers and other school-related materials
  • Prepare, issue, and count food coupons for payment purposes when required
  • Perform ad-hoc administrative duties as assigned

Requirements:

  • Minimum GCE ‘N’ Level Certificate or equivalent, with a pass in English
  • Valid First Aid and CPR certification
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office applications
  • Good communication and interpersonal skills, with patience and ability to remain calm in challenging situations
  • Demonstrates initiative, strong problem-solving skills, and ability to multitask
  • Able to work independently as well as collaboratively in a team
  • Minimum 3 years of relevant administrative experience, preferably in a school environment

postedCompany.description:
Dynamic Safety Pte Ltd is a Singapore-based QEHS consulting firm established by a team of experienced professionals committed to delivering comprehensive Environment, Workplace Safety & Health, and Quality solutions to organisations across various sectors.

Alongside our strong capabilities in QHSE Management System Auditing, Consulting, Outsourcing and Training, we also provide a wide range of manpower support services to meet the operational needs of industries in Singapore.

Our manpower services cover the deployment of qualified and experienced personnel, including:

  • WSH Officers, WSH Coordinators, ECOs, Safety Supervisors, Fire Safety personnel

  • Technical staff, Operations support staff

  • Receptionists, Administrative Executives, Customer Service personnel

  • Teachers, Student Care staff, Early Childhood assistants

  • Lab Assistants, Science/Technical support staff

  • Logistics, Warehouse, Production, and Field Support manpower

  • Other specialised manpower based on project requirements

With a team that brings together global expertise and strong local industry experience, Dynamic Safety Pte Ltd ensures clients receive reliable, cost-effective, and practical solutions that support compliance, enhance productivity, and promote workplace excellence.

We remain dedicated to delivering high-quality consulting services and dependable manpower support, helping organisations operate safely, efficiently, and successfully in today’s challenging business environment.
postedCompany.name: DYNAMIC SAFETY PTE. LTD.
